title: card: fetch_card_image returns empty String on failure instead of Option
description: fetch_card_image returns String, using String::new() as a sentinel for 'fetch failed'. The caller (fetch_and_store) then checks \!image_path.is_empty() to decide whether to include it. This conflates two distinct states — 'no image was present' and 'image fetch failed' — into a single empty string. It also makes it impossible to distinguish a failed download from a post that legitimately has no image. The return type should be Option<String> (or Option<PathBuf>): None means absent/failed, Some(path) means success.
